text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O and I are in the middle of a training
session, when...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Within the flow of an ever-changing universe... my radiance is immutable... even against the quagmire... of fatigue...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No, Trainer... Divine forces have placed this trial
before me. By the affliction of this suffering, I am
tested.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now... run! I must run! The majesty of the
Overlord must be known!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite so bold a resolve, her exhaustion is only
increasing. I'll need to adjust her race schedule so
she can get some rest.
